rationale: The query's core transferable method involves modeling networks (food webs or production networks) via static generative rules, dynamical stability analysis of coupled nonlinear systems, or endogenous assembly through entry and selection. The candidate studies opinion dynamics in social networks using a threshold-based diffusion model, focusing on the influence of committed minorities—this is a different mathematical machinery (diffusion/percolation vs. network assembly or dynamical stability). The object differs (social consensus networks vs. food webs), but the methods do not cohere.
